title: Conopodium smyrnioides
taxonomy: Conopodium smyrnioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Conopodium, which is a group of plants that are commonly known as earthchests or nutrachesters. The family Apiaceae, also known as the carrot or parsley family, is a large and diverse group of plants. The exact classification of Conopodium smyrnioides can be further refined at the subspecies or cultivar level, but its basic classification is well established within the plant kingdom.
